name: com.laicasaane.encosy-tower
description: Encosy Tower is a library that bundles an assortment of functionality such as additional data structures, Game Database, Persistence, ECS Stats, MVVM, Page Flows, Pooling, Pub/Sub, Vaults, additional functionality powered by source generators, and so on.

samples.description: Contains sample setup for Encosy Database
Contains sample setup for Encosy Mono Pages
Contains sample setup for Encosy MVVM
Contains sample setup for Encosy Pooling
Contains sample setup for Encosy PubSub
Contains sample setup for Encosy Entities Stats
Contains sample setup for Encosy Persistence
Contains sample setup for Encosy Visual Debugging
